Hero.headline: Integrated Global Logistics Solutions for Modern Businesses
Hero.subheadline: Reliable freight forwarding, cargo transport, customs clearance, and warehousing solutions worldwide.

MissionVision.title: Our Mission & Vision
MissionVision.mission_desc: To deliver world-class integrated logistics solutions by efficiently, securely, and transparently managing every stage of the supply chain. We are committed to providing a seamless, reliable, and agile service, enabling our clients to operate with complete peace of mind while driving business growth.
MissionVision.vision_desc: To establish ourselves as a leading global freight forwarder, recognized for operational excellence, continuous innovation, and our ability to connect international markets, creating sustainable value for our clients and strategic partners.

AboutUs.title: About Us
AboutUs.heading: Your Trusted Partner in Global Logistics
AboutUs.paragraph1: Logisti-k is a Miami-based freight forwarding company specializing in cargo transportation services. Our mission is to provide unique and efficient logistics solutions to manufacturers and courier agencies, focusing on offering integrated logistics services. With a commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction, we ensure seamless logistics and timely deliveries for all your shipping needs.
AboutUs.paragraph2: We’re not just freight forwarders—we’re your logistics partners. From port to warehouse, from paperwork to the final mile, our team ensures your cargo moves seamlessly, safely, and on time. We pride ourselves on industry knowledge, responsiveness, and a customer-first approach.

about.title: About Us
about.heading: Your Global Logistics Partner
about.feat1_desc: Exact timing and coordination for every shipment.
about.feat2_desc: Optimized routes to reduce cost and transit time.

Services.heroSubtitle: End-to-end supply chain solutions engineered to meet the complex demands of modern global trade.
Services.subtitle: Our Core Services
Services.title: Comprehensive Logistics Solutions
Services.description: We provide end-to-end supply chain services tailored to meet the complex demands of modern global trade.
Services.cargo_desc: Secure and efficient cargo transport services tailored to meet diverse shipping requirements globally.
Services.customs_desc: Expert customs brokerage services to ensure smooth compliance and minimize border delays.
Services.warehousing_desc: Secure storage facilities, inventory management, and fulfillment solutions tailored to your needs.
Services.ocean_desc: Reliable FCL and LCL ocean freight solutions connecting major global ports with competitive rates.
Services.air_desc: Express and standard air cargo services for time-sensitive international shipments.
Services.ground_desc: Extensive domestic and cross-border trucking network ensuring safe delivery to the final destination.
Services.process_step1_desc: We analyze your requirements and design the optimal route.
Services.process_step2_desc: Secure capacity and finalize all documentation.
Services.process_step3_desc: Your cargo is moved with real-time tracking visibility.
Services.process_step4_desc: Final mile delivery and customs clearance completed.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.heading: TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF DELIVERY AND STORAGE
Terms.subtitle: LOGISTI-K
Terms.intro: By using LOGISTI-K services, the client accepts the following terms and conditions:
Terms.sec1_desc: All merchandise, packages, or shipments will be delivered only upon confirmation of full payment for services, taxes, storage, customs duties, or other applicable concepts.
Terms.sec2_desc:
Any request for pickup, delivery, or dispatch scheduling must be made before 12:00 p.m. local time on the required day.

Requests received after 12:00 p.m. will be scheduled for the next business day, subject to operational availability.
Terms.sec3_desc:
Packages and merchandise will remain in storage at no additional cost only during the period established by LOGISTI-K.

Any merchandise not claimed within fifteen (15) calendar days after notification of availability for delivery or pickup will be considered abandoned.

Once abandonment is declared, LOGISTI-K shall have the right to take possession of the merchandise and dispose of it as it deems convenient, without any obligation to compensate the client.
Terms.sec4_desc:
Claims for damage, loss, or missing insured merchandise must be notified in writing within the first forty-eight (48) hours following receipt of the shipment.

For the evaluation of any claim, the client must provide photographic evidence, supporting documentation, and keep the original packaging.

After this period, insurance coverage will automatically be null and void, and no compensation or indemnity will apply.
Terms.sec5_desc:
LOGISTI-K will not be liable for claims submitted outside the deadlines established in these terms and conditions.

The client acknowledges and accepts that failure to comply with the indicated procedures and times limits any right to claim, refund, or compensation.
Terms.important_desc: All merchandise will be delivered only upon confirmation of payment. Pickup or delivery coordination must be done before 12:00 p.m.; otherwise, it will be scheduled for the next business day. Merchandise not claimed within 15 calendar days of arrival will be considered abandoned and will become available to LOGISTI-K. Claims for damage or loss of insured cargo must be submitted within the first 48 hours of receipt; after this period, no coverage, compensation, or claim will apply.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.heading: PRIVACY POLICY
Privacy.subtitle: LOGISTI-K
Privacy.intro: At LOGISTI-K, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information when you use our website and logistics services.
Privacy.sec1_desc: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as your name, email address, phone number, shipping details, and billing information when you request a quote, book a shipment, or contact us.
Privacy.sec2_desc: We use the information we collect to provide and improve our logistics services, process shipments and invoices, send updates about your packages, respond to your inquiries, and comply with legal requirements.
Privacy.sec3_desc: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information with trusted third-party service providers, agents, or customs authorities only as necessary to perform shipping, delivery, and logistics services on your behalf.
Privacy.sec4_desc: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, loss, alteration, or disclosure.
Privacy.sec5_desc: You have the right to access, update, or request the deletion of your personal information in our records. To exercise these rights, please contact us at our official email address.
Privacy.sms_desc:
By submitting your phone number, you agree to receive SMS notifications from LOGISTI-K regarding shipment updates, package arrivals, invoices, payment reminders, and delivery notifications.

Message frequency varies.
Message and data rates may apply.
Reply STOP to opt out.
Reply HELP for assistance.
